life_events.summary: took up part-time gardening at the community plot
started taking the 7:42 train into town three days a week
grandchildren moved in for the year, household now four
switched from the leisure-centre gym to the council swim membership
monthly cadence of changing the regular swim slot

t7_ground_truth.rationale: repeated mentions of catching the 7:42 train, buying a rail season ticket, train delays -> public transit; logistical evidence, not demographic
grandchildren moved in plus partner -> 3-4; explicit count not stated, inferred from cooking-for-four and school-run mentions

stereotype_audit: Older retiree who is practical and active (gardening, swimming, daily train) — avoids the tech-averse/frail elder trope. Commute/household inferences are logistical. No protected-class content.
